title: Prediction record
description: One forecast submission for a single (method, model) at one origin, covering all requested horizons. Append-only; never revised after commit.

origin_date.description: Trading day whose close the forecast is conditioned on (data-through-close).

origin_timestamp.description: Market-close timestamp defining the information cutoff for this forecast.

submission_timestamp.description: Exact wall-clock time the forecast was committed. Recorded per the submission rule.

model.description: Backing model id for LLM/agent methods; null for conventional methods.

predictor_id.description: Stable predictor identifier (committed caches key on this string).

twin_id.description: Present only for adaptive twins; identifies the frozen/learning arm.

rationale.description: Agent-authored overall rationale. PUBLIC. Empty for conventional methods.

langfuse_trace_id.description: Langfuse trace id for this run; null for conventional methods. Links authorized users to the full internal trace.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the data contract this record conforms to.

method.description: Per-rung method identifier (schema 1.1.0: one enum value per deployed rung; adaptive_* are forward declarations for the stage-2c twins).

point_estimate.description: Central forecast; must equal the 0.50 quantile value (harness invariant).

quantiles.description: The standard 11-point quantile grid, non-decreasing in value (harness invariant).

curated_trace_summary.description: Curated, PUBLIC trace summary. Tool names and query TITLES only; never raw retrieved article text or internal prompt scaffolding.
